caption: A man is seated in a studio setting, wearing a white long-sleeved shirt, a red bow tie, and tan suspenders. He sports a large, sculpted, silver-grey hairpiece that peaks upward and wears glasses and black over-the-ear headphones. He is positioned in front of a black microphone, and the background consists of a wall adorned with numerous framed photographs. The logo "BOSS TALK JOY PODCAST" appears on the screen in red and white text. Throughout the sequence, the man is speaking, with his mouth open and expressions shifting as he talks. He remains seated in the same position, though his head tilts slightly and his hand moves into view at the bottom of the frame toward the end of the sequence. The background and equipment remain stationary as the man continues his delivery.
